docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN HOTELS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DOANE, S. SUMMONS ISSUED

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN HOTELS, INC. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-05-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON SEP-12-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AS TO DEFENDANT DOANE, S.

JUDGE PRO-TEM THORN SMITH, C.O'LEARY, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, ALL PARTIES PRESENT. THOMAS WRIGHT FOR PLTF, DEFT IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION, TERMS NOT ON THE RECORD BUT CONTAINED IN A JUDGMENT SIGNED BY BOTH PARTIES AND SUBMITTED TO COURT FOR SIGNATURE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOANE, S. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 161 POWELL STREET, #708, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL SEP-30-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, ACTUAL EVICTION IS STAYED UNTIL 9/30/95, BUT COMPUTER SETS IT OCTOBER 2, 1995. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
